expectations.text: Uses shadcn/ui Dialog components (DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter)
expectations.evidence: Lines 4-14: imports AlertDialog variants from @/components/ui/alert-dialog. AlertDialog is a shadcn/ui dialog variant.

expectations.text: Uses shadcn/ui Popover components (Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent)
expectations.evidence: Lines 16-19: imports Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger from '@/components/ui/popover'

expectations.text: Does NOT import directly from @base-ui/react for Dialog or Popover
expectations.evidence: No @base-ui/react imports anywhere in the file

expectations.text: Includes proper accessibility attributes or relies on shadcn's built-in a11y
expectations.evidence: Line 44: aria-label on help button, focus/blur handlers for keyboard access

expectations.text: Has Cancel and Confirm action buttons in the dialog
